title: SGPGIMS Lucknow – Technician, Junior Engineer and More – 47 Posts

basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Lucknow Group B & C Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 47 Technician, Junior Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS Lucknow) is now open for 47 vacancies of Technician, Junior Engineer and More Posts for Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, with applications accepted online through the official website sgpgims.org.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS), Lucknow
basic_details.post_name: Various Group B & Group C Posts (Backlog)

how_to_apply: Visit the official website of SGPGIMS — www.sgpgims.org.in
Find the link for “Online Application for Group B & C Backlog Posts 2026”.
Register yourself with a valid email ID and mobile number.
Fill the online application form carefully with all required details.
Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and relevant documents.
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.
